scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @dotpaymini/web" "npm run dev --workspace @dotpaymini/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @dotpaymini/web && npm run build --workspace @dotpaymini/api
scripts.start: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run start --workspace @dotpaymini/web" "npm run start --workspace @dotpaymini/api"
